research_question: In patients with Wilson disease (Population), how do common therapies including copper chelators and zinc supplementation (Intervention) compare in terms of effectiveness on clinical outcomes such as survival, hepatic function, and neurological status (Outcome) when evaluated in controlled study designs (Study Design)?

comparison.name: Comparison
include: dose comparison high vs low penicillamine
dose comparison high vs low trientine
dose comparison high vs low zinc
Different dosing regimens of the same therapy
Comparative studies between different Wilson disease treatments
exclude: comparison with other inborn errors of metabolism
comparison with non-alcoholic fatty liver disease

Studies without a control or comparison group
Historical controls not directly comparing Wilson disease therapies
